summary: Backend + frontend map regression executed on public preview. Core map flow works: species map renders, all-findings map renders, zoom controls work, and marker click navigates to species route without web crash.

minor.issue: Part of existing suite skips when only EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is available because BASE_URL fixture checks EXPO_BACKEND_URL only.

integration_issues.issue: Navigation appears to work, but Playwright visibility wait was flaky because selector [data-testid=all-findings-map] resolved to multiple nodes during transition.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings observed: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' and '"shadow*" style props are deprecated'.

action_items: Main agent: deduplicate/strengthen map testIDs on /map so automation can target a unique visible all-findings-map node during route transitions.
Main agent: align backend test BASE_URL resolution to support EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL fallback consistently.
critical_code_review_comments: ScatterMapLeaflet markers do not expose dedicated testID hooks on web, which makes stable marker-level automation fragile.
Several interactive onboarding buttons still lack explicit testID, reducing deterministic mobile-web E2E coverage.

success_rate.backend: 100% (executed: 3/3 passed in test_dyrejagten_regression; additional map tests in test_api_flows skipped due env var expectation)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test findings via /api/findings for active web user natur-1777537700379-bz7jhj to validate map markers and route navigation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map behavior is functionally validated (render, zoom, marker->species route). Remaining issue is selector stability on return to /map due multiple matching nodes for all-findings-map during transitions.
rca_of_issue: Observed flaky UI assertion was tooling-level, not functional break: after tapping 'Se alle fund på kort', URL and rendered map indicate navigation success, but Playwright visibility wait on [data-testid=all-findings-map] timed out because multiple matching elements existed and first resolved node was not visible.
